title: HDI Global Leverages Verisk's Mozart Form Composer® to Streamline Forms Management
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., May 31, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Industrial insurer HDI Global Insurance Company (HDI) will be leveraging the cloud-based technology and advanced analytics of Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, to help increase efficiency and develop innovative insurance products.

title: Property and Casualty Insurers Experience Underwriting Loss in 2021, But Remain Strong
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., May 26, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Despite experiencing an underwriting loss, the property/casualty insurance industry ended 2021 strong and able to support policyholders, according to a report from Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, and the American Property Casualty Insurance Association (APCIA).

title: Verisk taps Lee Shavel as new CEO
text: Verisk Analytics Inc. VRSK, -0.28% on Wednesday named Lee M. Shavel as chief executive officer after he worked as chief financial officer of the Jersey City, N.J.

title: Verisk Appoints Lee M. Shavel as CEO, Mark V.
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., May 25, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, today announced the appointment of Lee M. Shavel to CEO and Mark V. Anquillare to President following the company's annual shareholder meeting. Shavel was also elected to the Verisk Board of Directors. At this time, three new independent directors, nominated by the company, were elected to the company's Board of Directors: Jeffrey Dailey, Wendy Lane and Kimberly S. Stevenson.

title: Verisk and Swiss Re Help Insurers Drive High Performance Auto Portfolios
text: Jersey City, N.J., May 24, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, announced today that Swiss Re is using Verisk's ISO DataCube™ to help auto insurers improve the performance of their existing books and unlock new business opportunities.

title: Verisk (VRSK) Riding on Growth Strategies, Debt Woes Stay
text: Verisk (VRSK) remains focused on organic growth, product development and acquisitions.

title: Auto Insurers Aim to Streamline the Total-Loss Process with Verisk's New Lien Check Solution
text: Database contributors can gain access to lender data through ClaimSearch® Database contributors can gain access to lender data through ClaimSearch®

title: Verisk's (VRSK) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Verisk's (VRSK) first-quarter 2022 earnings and revenues surge year over year.

title: Verisk Analytics, Inc. (VRSK) CEO Scott Stephenson on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Verisk Analytics, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSK ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2022 8:30 AM ET Corporate Participants Stacey Brodbar - Head of Investor Relations Scott Stephenson - Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer Lee Shavel - Incoming CEO Mark Anquillare - Chief Operating Officer and Incoming President David Grover - Controller and Chief Accounting Officer Conference Call Participants Alex Kramm - UBS Greg Parrish - Morgan Stanley Ashish Sabadra - RBC Capital Markets Andrew Steinerman - JPMorgan Greg Peters - Raymond James Jeff Meuler - Baird Heather Balsky - Bank of America Manav Patnaik - Barclays Jeff Silber - BMO Capital Markets George Tong - Goldman Sachs Andrew Jeffrey - Truist Faiza Alwy - Deutsche Bank Hans Hoffman - Jefferies Kevin McVeigh - Credit Suisse Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the Verisk First Quarter 2022 Earnings Results Conference Call. This call is being recorded.

title: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Verisk (VRSK) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -3.60% and 0.67%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Verisk Names Bruce Hansen Chairperson of the Board of Directors
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., May 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, today announced that Bruce Hansen has been named Chairperson of the Board of Directors, effective as of May 5, 2022. Hansen will succeed Scott G. Stephenson who, as previously announced, will retire from the company following Verisk's 2022 Annual Meeting of Shareholders.

title: Verisk Reports First-Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., May 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, today announced results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2022.
